name: v1alpha1RepositoryCertificate
description: v1alpha1RepositoryCertificate schema from Argo CD API

certData.name: CertData contains the actual certificate data, dependent on the certificate type

certInfo.name: CertInfo will hold additional certificate info, depdendent on the certificate type (e.g. SSH fingerprint, X509 CommonName)

certSubType.name: CertSubType specifies the sub type of the cert, i.e. "ssh-rsa"

certType.name: CertType specifies the type of the certificate - currently one of "https" or "ssh"

serverName.name: ServerName specifies the DNS name of the server this certificate is intended for
